phoneticUs: ﾋ系ﾊ較ﾉ厖垸eptﾉｪk; ﾋ系jﾊ較ﾉ厖垸eptﾉｪk
meaning: n.邊ｾ逾樊椛蛻ｶ闕ｯ,螳牙ｮ夊艮
examples: Objective : To observe the therapeutic effect of Chenxia Liujunzi Wan ( CLW ) for neuroleptic salivation .
This is the largest neuroleptic withdrawal study of Alzheimer's patients and the only long-term one of its type.
It was found that the death causes were correlated with the neuroleptic doses, the application of combined drugs, and the body conditions, etc.
